scope: kv_verify/ full package: lib/, experiments/, pipeline.py, config.py, shims, types.py, fixtures.py, data_loader.py

findings.description: Duplicated _extract_features() function across data_loader.py, f02, and f03. All three do identical feature matrix extraction from item dicts.
findings.impact: No correctness impact. Code duplication only.
findings.recommendation: Import from data_loader.py instead of redefining.

findings.description: Duplicated _load_json() and HACKATHON_DIR constant across data_loader.py, f02, f04, f01d, and f01b. The canonical definition is in data_loader.py.
findings.impact: No correctness impact. Code duplication only.
findings.recommendation: Import _load_json from data_loader.py. Rename to load_json if public API concern.

findings.description: Duplicated _loo_auroc() function in f02 and f03. Identical LOO cross-validated AUROC implementation.
findings.impact: No correctness impact. Code duplication only.

findings.description: Duplicated _train_test_auroc() function in f02, with same pattern inline in f03.
findings.impact: No correctness impact. Code duplication only.

findings.description: Duplicated train/test residualization in f02 (_residualize_train_test) and f03 (_residualize_cross_model). lib/stats.py has fwl_residualize() with different API shape.
findings.impact: No correctness impact. Slightly different API shape from lib version.
findings.recommendation: Add fwl_residualize_split(X_train, Z_train, X_test, Z_test) to lib/stats.py.

findings.description: Duplicated input-token extraction logic across f02 (_get_input_tokens, _extract_input_lengths), f03 (_extract_input_tokens), data_loader (_extract_confounds), and pipeline.py (inline get_input_tokens).
findings.impact: No correctness impact. Code duplication only. f02 version has the most robust fallback logic.

findings.description: _stratified_auroc() in f01_falsification.py has no equivalent in lib/stats.py. Only used in one place but could be reusable.
findings.impact: No correctness impact. Missing library function.

findings.description: Double computation of TF-IDF + KMeans clustering in gap_filler.py. analyze_gaps() computes clustering at line 320-323, then calls _compute_gaps() which computes it again at lines 251-254 on the same data.
findings.impact: Wasted computation (2x clustering). No correctness impact since both use same random_state=42.
findings.recommendation: Compute once in analyze_gaps() and pass results to _compute_gaps().

referrals.description: Verify that the train/test split residualization in experiment files (f02 _residualize_train_test, f03 _residualize_cross_model) produces identical results to lib/stats.py fwl_residualize(within_fold=True, train_idx=..., test_idx=...). The API shapes differ and should be tested for equivalence.
